title: Regular closed OR coefficients
summary: Defines the rational/Pochhammer form of the regular Ovsienko–Redou coefficient and packages it as a coefficient system, while leaving its global defect-cancellation recurrence separate.

mathematicalContent.heading: Closed coefficient container
mathematicalContent.body: A closed formula assigns a rational coefficient to every order, rational dimension/weight triple, and OR index.

mathematicalContent.heading: Regular formula
mathematicalContent.body: For I=(a,b,c), a+b+c=N, the coefficient is a trinomial factor times three Pochhammer factors.

mathematicalContent.heading: Separation of tasks
mathematicalContent.body: The module defines the formula and the predicate that it satisfies a chosen recurrence, but does not prove the full defect-cancellation statement.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Stores a closed rational coefficient formula depending on order, dimension, two weights, and a degree-N OR index.

correspondence.leanType: def toCoefficientSystem (Φ : ORClosedCoefficientFormula) (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) : ORCoefficientSystem N
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Turns a closed formula at fixed parameters into an OR coefficient system.

correspondence.leanType: theorem toCoefficientSystem_coeff (Φ : ORClosedCoefficientFormula) (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : (Φ.toCoefficientSystem N n w₁ w₂).coeff I = Φ.coeff N n w₁ w₂ I
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Unfolds the coefficient of the system obtained from a closed formula.

correspondence.leanType: def SatisfiesRecurrence {N : ℕ} {κ : Type _} [DecidableEq κ] (Φ : ORClosedCoefficientFormula) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (K : Finset κ) (defectCoeffQ : ORIndex N → Fin 2 → κ → ℚ) : Prop
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines what it means for a closed formula to satisfy the chosen OR recurrence and defect basis.

correspondence.leanType: def ORRegularMultinomialFactor {N : ℕ} (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the trinomial factor attached to I=(a,b,c).

correspondence.leanType: def ORRegularA {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the Gamma-ratio part of the regular coefficient in Pochhammer form.

correspondence.leanType: def ORRegularCoeff {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the regular rational coefficient as the trinomial factor times the Pochhammer part.
Packages the regular coefficient as a closed formula valid for all parameter inputs.

correspondence.leanType: def ORCoefficientSystem.regular (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) : ORCoefficientSystem N
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Forms the fixed-parameter coefficient system associated with the regular closed formula.

correspondence.leanType: theorem ORCoefficientSystem.regular_coeff (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : (ORCoefficientSystem.regular N n w₁ w₂).coeff I = ORRegularCoeff n w₁ w₂ I
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Unfolds a coefficient of the regular system.

references.locator: Classification of invariant bilinear differential operators
references.note: Flat-model origin of the coefficient family.
Primary curved ambient source for the encoded OR recurrence.

limitations: The regular coefficient formula is defined, not yet shown here to cancel the geometric defect expansion. SatisfiesRecurrence is only a predicate, and the file contains no tangentiality theorem or analysis of exceptional/singular parameter conventions.
